Case Study • Various

How we helped Ketan Brothers Diamonds Exports Releases Maiden Sustainability Report for FY 2022-23 in Partnership with Growlity

The Challenge

Detailed inside.

Our Solution

Detailed inside.

The Results

Detailed inside.

Mumbai, India, December 15, 2023

Ketan Brothers Diamonds Exports, based in Mumbai, India, proudly presents its inaugural Sustainability Report for the fiscal year 2022-23. This milestone publication reflects the company’s commitment to transparency, ethical practices, and environmental responsibility. The report signifies Ketan Brothers’ proactive stance in fostering sustainability within the diamond trading sector.

The release of the Sustainability Report coincides with the company’s strategic partnership with Growlity, a reputable and global firm specializing in Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) strategies and Sustainability solutions. Growlity’s expertise has been instrumental in aiding Ketan Brothers Diamondz Exports in calculating their greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions and devising strategies to offset their carbon footprint, mitigating their environmental impact.

Partner of Ketan Brothers Diamonds Exports, Mr. Jay Parikh, expressed warmth about this milestone, stating, “Our inaugural Sustainability Report represents a pivotal step in our journey toward sustainable and responsible business practices. Collaborating with Growlity has been instrumental in assessing our environmental impact and taking proactive measures to reduce it.”

Moreover, President & CEO of Growlity, Dr. Nitin Dumasia, highlighted the significance of this partnership, saying, “Partnering with Ketan Brothers Diamondz Exports signifies a shared commitment to promoting sustainability within the diamond trading industry. Our collaboration has not only facilitated the measurement of GHG emissions but has also allowed us to explore effective strategies to mitigate environmental impact.”

The partnership between Ketan Brothers Diamondz Exports and Growlity underscores a joint commitment to integrate sustainability as a core component of operations within the natural diamond trading sector, driving positive change and responsible practices.

For more insights into Ketan Brothers Diamonds Exports’ Sustainability Report and their sustainable initiatives, please Click Here.
